categories.name: Training Pipelines

Train a CNN: convolution, pooling, ReLU activation, loss, backward pass through all layers, weight update
Config-driven training loop with weight decay and logging every 10 epochs
Train a transformer block: multi-head attention, layer norm, forward pass, backward pass
Train a network using TNET with 500 epochs and learning rate 0.001
Train a 3-layer MLP with batch normalization after each hidden layer and dropout rate 0.2
Train with BN and DROP: forward pass, batch normalize hidden activations, apply dropout, compute loss, backprop

categories.name: Inference
prompts: Run inference on input data through a trained model, apply softmax to get probabilities
Forward pass only: embedding lookup, attention, layer norm, output projection
Run INFER on input, apply softmax, return top prediction
Normalize input, run inference, return predictions without updating weights
Inference with batch normalization: load input, BN normalize, linear layer, softmax (DROP rate 0.0 to disable)

categories.name: Backward Passes
prompts: Backpropagate through a softmax layer
Backpropagate through a convolution layer, get input gradient and kernel gradient
Full backward pass through a 3-layer network: ReLU, sigmoid, softmax
Compute input and weight gradients for a linear layer using MMULBK
Attention backward pass: compute Q, K, V gradients

categories.name: Vision
prompts: CNN forward pass: zero-pad input, apply convolution, max pool, ReLU
Image classification: convolution, pooling, flatten, linear layer, softmax
Apply convolution with stride, then upscale output back to original size
Grouped convolution forward pass with bias addition
4D NCHW vision pipeline: load batch of images, CONV with 4D kernel, POOL, BN, ReLU, flatten, classify

categories.name: Transformers
prompts: Transformer encoder block: multi-head attention, residual connection, layer norm, feed-forward
Embedding lookup for token IDs, add positional encoding, apply attention
Self-attention forward pass with Q, K, V projections
Layer norm followed by GELU activation and linear projection

categories.name: Arithmetic & Control
prompts: Matrix multiply A and B, add bias, apply ReLU, store result
Loop 100 times: accumulate gradients, update weights every 10 steps
Compare loss to threshold, jump to early stopping if converged
Compute dot product, scale by learning rate, subtract from weights
Add two vectors element-wise using MADD, store the result
Scalar add a bias to every element using SADD, then scalar subtract a mean using SSUB

categories.name: Reduction & Signal
prompts: Reduce a tensor: sum all elements with RDUC mode 0, compute mean with mode 1
Clamp activations between -1 and 1 using CLMP
Conditional select: use WHER to pick values above threshold
Create a comparison mask with CMPR, then use WHER to zero out low-confidence predictions
Apply FFT to a signal, filter in frequency domain with FILT, then reconstruct

categories.name: M2M & Fragments
prompts: Create a reusable FRAG for a linear layer (MMUL + MADD + RELU), call it with LINK
Sign a program with SIGN, verify with VRFY before execution
Gather embeddings from a lookup table using GATH, scatter results back with SCAT
Compute cosine distance between two vectors using PROJ and DIST
Add META annotations for model name, version, and author

Apply weight decay to all weight matrices before each training step
Run model inference on test input without updating weights, return softmax probabilities
Full v0.9 training pipeline: TRAIN opcode with config tensor, TLOG, WDECAY, INFER

Add dropout (DROP) with rate 0.3 after each hidden layer during training

Inference with BN but dropout disabled: BN R5 R5 R6 R7, DROP R5 R5 #0.0
N-layer TNET: train a 4-layer MLP using config tensor with shape [4,3]

categories.name: General Purpose
prompts: Convert integer tensor to float with ITOF, perform computation, convert back with FTOI
